law.text:
Article 1. Definitions

par. 1. For the purposes of this Act, the following definitions apply:

(1) alien: any person who does not provide proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

(3) third-country national: any person who is not a Union citizen and who is not a person enjoying the Community right of free movement, as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

(4) illegal stay: the presence on the territory of an alien who does not or no longer meets the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

(11) risk of absconding: the fact that there are reasons to believe that an alien who is the subject of a removal procedure, a procedure for the granting of international protection, or a procedure for the determination of or transfer to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection, will abscond, having regard to the criteria listed in paragraph 2.

(14) identified alien: any alien:
(a) who is in possession of a valid travel document, a valid passport, or a valid identity document; or
(b) who has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer; or
(c) who falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may themselves issue a laissez-passer.

par. 2. The risk of absconding referred to in paragraph 1, (11), must be current and real. It shall be established following an individual examination and on the basis of one or more of the following objective criteria, taking into account all circumstances specific to each case:

(1) The person concerned has not submitted a residence application following their illegal entry or during their illegal stay, or has not made their application for international protection within the time limit provided for by this Act.

(2) The person concerned has used false or misleading information or false or falsified documents in the context of a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry, or has committed fraud or used other unlawful means.

(3) The person concerned does not cooperate or has not cooperated in the context of their relations with the authorities responsible for the implementation of and/or supervision of compliance with the regulations concerning access to the territory, residence, establishment, and removal of aliens.

(4) The person concerned has made clear that they do not wish to comply with one of the following measures, or has already failed to comply with one of these measures:
(a) a transfer, refusal-of-entry, or removal measure;
(b) an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended;
(c) a less coercive measure than a deprivation of liberty measure aimed at guaranteeing their transfer, refusal of entry, or removal, regardless of whether it is a liberty-restricting measure or another measure;
(d) a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security;
(e) a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to the measures referred to in (a), (b), (c), or (d).

(5) The person concerned is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

(6) The person concerned has, immediately after having been the subject of a decision refusing entry or residence or a decision terminating their stay, or immediately after having been the subject of a refusal-of-entry or removal measure, submitted a new residence application or a new application for international protection.

(7) While being questioned on that point, the person concerned concealed the fact that they had already provided their fingerprints in another State bound by the European regulations concerning the determination of the State responsible for examining an application for international protection, after having submitted an application for international protection.

(8) The person concerned has submitted multiple applications for international protection and/or residence applications in the Kingdom or in one or more other Member States, which have given rise to a negative decision or which have not resulted in the issuance of a residence permit.

(9) While being questioned on that point, the person concerned concealed the fact that they had previously submitted an application for international protection in another State bound by the European regulations concerning the determination of the State responsible for examining an application for international protection.

(10) The person concerned has declared, or it appears from their file, that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

(11) The person concerned is the subject of a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

kb_used.fo:
vocabulary V {
  type Person
  type Document
  type MemberState
  type Procedure
  is_alien: Person -> Bool
  qualifies_as_alien: Person -> Bool
  is_third_country_national: Person -> Bool
  is_in_illegal_stay: Person -> Bool
  is_subject_to_removal_procedure: Person -> Bool
  is_subject_to_international_protection_procedure: Person -> Bool
  is_subject_to_responsible_member_state_determination_procedure: Person -> Bool
  individual_examination_performed: Person -> Bool
  no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay: Person -> Bool
  no_international_protection_application_within_time_limit: Person -> Bool
  used_false_information_or_documents: Person -> Bool
  committed_fraud_or_unlawful_means: Person -> Bool
  does_not_cooperate_with_authorities: Person -> Bool
  declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_measure: Person -> Bool
  failed_to_comply_with_measure: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban_in_kingdom: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban_in_member_state: Person -> Bool
  submitted_new_application_immediately_after_negative_decision: Person -> Bool
  concealed_fingerprints_in_other_state: Person -> Bool
  submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome: Person -> Bool
  concealed_prior_international_protection_application: Person -> Bool
  declared_or_file_shows_purpose_other_than_application: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal: Person -> Bool
  has_valid_travel_document: Person -> Bool
  recognised_as_national_by_country_authority: Person -> Bool
  falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nationality_category: Person -> Bool
  at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
  is_identified_alien: Person -> Bool
  risk_of_absconding: Person -> Bool
}

theory T:V {
  ! p in Person: ((qualifies_as_alien(p))) <=> ((is_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((has_valid_travel_document(p))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((recognised_as_national_by_country_authority(p))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nationality_category(p))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((no_international_protection_application_within_time_limit(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((used_false_information_or_documents(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((committed_fraud_or_unlawful_means(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((does_not_cooperate_with_authorities(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_measure(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((failed_to_comply_with_measure(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban_in_kingdom(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban_in_member_state(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((submitted_new_application_immediately_after_negative_decision(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((concealed_fingerprints_in_other_state(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((concealed_prior_international_protection_application(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((declared_or_file_shows_purpose_other_than_application(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((qualifies_as_alien(p)) & ((is_subject_to_removal_procedure(p)) | (is_subject_to_international_protection_procedure(p)) | (is_subject_to_responsible_member_state_determination_procedure(p))) & (individual_examination_performed(p)) & (at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p)))) => ((risk_of_absconding(p))).
}

case.text: Rami is a foreign national. He is the subject of a removal procedure and has used false documents in a residence application.

questions.text: Can the use of false documents by Rami constitute an objective criterion for risk of absconding within the meaning of Article 1, paragraph 2, point 2?

expected.reason: Art. 1 par. 2 point 2 lists the use of false or falsified documents in a residence, international-protection, removal, or refusal-of-entry procedure as an objective criterion for risk of absconding.

is_alien.name: is_alien
is_alien.description: The person does not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

qualifies_as_alien.name: qualifies_as_alien
qualifies_as_alien.description: The person legally qualifies as an alien under the statutory definition (does not prove Belgian nationality).

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is not a Union citizen and not a person enjoying the Community right of free movement.

is_in_illegal_stay.name: is_in_illegal_stay
is_in_illegal_stay.description: The person is present on the territory without meeting the conditions for entry or stay.

is_subject_to_removal_procedure.name: is_subject_to_removal_procedure
is_subject_to_removal_procedure.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

is_subject_to_international_protection_p.name: is_subject_to_international_protection_procedure
is_subject_to_international_protection_p.description: The person is subject to a procedure for the granting of international protection.

is_subject_to_responsible_member_state_d.name: is_subject_to_responsible_member_state_determination_procedure
is_subject_to_responsible_member_state_d.description: The person is subject to a procedure for the determination of or transfer to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination has been performed for the person to assess risk of absconding.

no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay
no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.description: The person has not submitted a residence application following illegal entry or during illegal stay.

no_international_protection_application_.name: no_international_protection_application_within_time_limit
no_international_protection_application_.description: The person has not made their application for international protection within the statutory time limit.

used_false_information_or_documents.name: used_false_information_or_documents
used_false_information_or_documents.description: The person has used false or misleading information or false or falsified documents in a relevant procedure.

committed_fraud_or_unlawful_means.name: committed_fraud_or_unlawful_means
committed_fraud_or_unlawful_means.description: The person has committed fraud or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.name: does_not_cooperate_with_authorities
does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal.

declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_me.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_measure
declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_me.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a transfer, refusal-of-entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, liberty-restricting, or equivalent Member State measure.

failed_to_comply_with_measure.name: failed_to_comply_with_measure
failed_to_comply_with_measure.description: The person has already failed to comply with a transfer, refusal-of-entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, liberty-restricting, or equivalent Member State measure.

subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban_in_kingdom.name: subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban_in_kingdom
subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban_in_kingdom.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban_in_member_.name: subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban_in_member_state
subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban_in_member_.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

submitted_new_application_immediately_af.name: submitted_new_application_immediately_after_negative_decision
submitted_new_application_immediately_af.description: The person submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after a decision refusing entry, residence, terminating stay, or a refusal-of-entry or removal measure.

concealed_fingerprints_in_other_state.name: concealed_fingerprints_in_other_state
concealed_fingerprints_in_other_state.description: When questioned, the person concealed that they had already provided fingerprints in another Dublin-bound State after submitting an international protection application.

submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.description: The person has submitted multiple international protection or residence applications in the Kingdom or other Member States resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

concealed_prior_international_protection.name: concealed_prior_international_protection_application
concealed_prior_international_protection.description: When questioned, the person concealed that they had previously submitted an international protection application in another Dublin-bound State.

declared_or_file_shows_purpose_other_tha.name: declared_or_file_shows_purpose_other_than_application
declared_or_file_shows_purpose_other_tha.description: The person declared or their file shows they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an international protection or residence application.

subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.description: The person is subject to a fine for submitting a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

has_valid_travel_document.name: has_valid_travel_document
has_valid_travel_document.description: The person is in possession of a valid travel document, passport, or identity document.

recognised_as_national_by_country_author.name: recognised_as_national_by_country_authority
recognised_as_national_by_country_author.description: The person has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nat.name: falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nationality_category
falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nat.description: The person falls within a nationality category for which the minister may themselves issue a laissez-passer.

at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.description: At least one of the objective criteria listed in paragraph 2 for risk of absconding is met by the person.

is_identified_alien.name: is_identified_alien
is_identified_alien.description: The person qualifies as an identified alien under the statutory definition.

risk_of_absconding.name: risk_of_absconding
risk_of_absconding.description: There is a legally established risk of absconding for the person, based on individual examination and at least one objective criterion.

routing.question: Can the use of false documents by Rami constitute an objective criterion for risk of absconding within the meaning of Article 1, paragraph 2, point 2?

symbolic_intent_routing.question: Can the use of false documents by Rami constitute an objective criterion for risk of absconding within the meaning of Article 1, paragraph 2, point 2?

pipeline.natural_language: Yes. Rami: There is a legally established risk of absconding for the person, based on individual examination and at least one objective criterion.
